period.timezone_note: Run date is 2026-07-12 KST. Previous successful cutoff was 2026-07-10T06:52:24Z. Local history rows after the previous cutoff were used as the string window; public web metadata supplied the current build hash. latest_changes.json had empty string_changes.

clusters.title: Plant object actions and status labels
clusters.source_context: The same string window added six plant-related labels together. No matching API or experiment consumer was confirmed in the public data, so the exact Discord surface remains unconfirmed.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 식물 오브젝트의 상태와 동작을 설명하는 라벨 묶음으로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings look like labels for a plant object, its actions, and its life-state statuses.

clusters.title: Wishlist and Shop discovery labels
clusters.source_context: The string window added Wishlist & Recommendations and Shop this Look. Recent public report entries also record 2026-07-smag-dm-sidebar-nitro-recommendation and 2026-07-shop-this-look as added experiment IDs, while noting that an exact consumer was not confirmed.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Shop이나 wishlist 주변에서 추천 항목이나 룩 관련 상품을 발견하게 하는 라벨로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings appear to label Shop or wishlist discovery surfaces for recommendations and look-based shopping.

clusters.title: Channel topic navigation copy
clusters.source_context: Navigate chat by topic and Browse conversations happening in this channel were deleted and re-added within minutes, which indicates string churn around the same channel-topic navigation surface rather than a confirmed removal.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 채널 안의 대화를 주제별로 찾아보거나 탐색하는 안내 문구입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe browsing or navigating channel conversations by topic.

clusters.title: Server Tag and Boost unlock messaging
clusters.source_context: The same string window added Unlock a Server Tag with Boosts and represent-this-server copy, while Korean strings refined boost-count messages for unlocking or keeping server perks active.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 서버 부스트로 Server Tag나 서버 특전을 잠금 해제하고 유지하는 흐름을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings explain unlocking and maintaining Server Tag or server perks through Boosts.

clusters.title: Quest and Orbs progress status labels
clusters.source_context: The same window contains an Orbs cooldown wording update plus Cannot unlock and Cannot progress labels. Public experiment data also added 2026-07-quest-bar-secondary-cta shortly after, but the exact consumer for the blocked labels is not confirmed.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Quest/Orbs 보상에서 다음 지급 시점이나 진행·잠금 해제 불가 상태를 나타내는 라벨로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings appear to label Quest or Orbs reward timing and blocked progress or unlock states.

clusters.title: Premium Group switch and cooldown copy
clusters.source_context: Korean Premium Group strings were modified to clarify the monthly cooldown wording and the immediate end of the current subscription when accepting an invite from another primary plan.
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Premium Group 특전에 참여하거나 다른 플랜 초대를 수락할 때 적용되는 구독 전환과 cooldown 안내입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe Premium Group membership, subscription switching, and cooldown rules when accepting an invite from another primary plan.

annotated_strings.value: Browse conversations happening in this channel.
Browse conversations happening in this channel.
Unlock a Server Tag with Boosts
Let your members represent this server everywhere on Discord.
오늘 만료되기 전에 {boostCount}개의 부스트를 추가해서 계속 활성 상태로 유지하세요.
{primaryName} 플랜에서 {premiumGroupProductName} 특전을 잠금 해제하도록 초대받았어요. 수락하면 현재 구독이 일할 계산 없이 즉시 종료돼요. {cooldownMonths}개월마다 한 번만 {premiumGroupProductName}에 가입할 수 있어요.
부스트 {boostCount}개만 더 있으면 모두가 {perkName} 특전을 잠금 해제할 수 있어요.
{days}일 후에 더 많은 Orbs가 찾아올 거예요!

search_signals.notes: Public Google results were not required; local history, public web JSON, and current reports were sufficient. Weak labels were deferred rather than forced into keyword-stuffed explanations.

commits.message: Add string context interpretations for July 12 strings

latest_changes.reason: data/latest_changes.json currently has empty string_changes dictionaries for en and ko.

publish.notes: Report publish metadata is committed by a follow-up commit after the data/report publish commit.
